name: property managers handling 10-20 maintenance requests/month tool
description: For property managers processing 10-20 maintenance requests/month, inefficient tracking causes tenant dissatisfaction. We automate status updates instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or emails.
problem_solved: Inefficient tracking of maintenance requests leads to delayed updates and tenant dissatisfaction.
